heuristics: Avoid repeated back-and-forth moves that do not push boxes, as they waste steps and lead to timeouts.
Do not move the player away from boxes or goals without pushing a box, especially when close to a box or goal.
Prioritize pushing boxes towards goals rather than moving around without progress.
Avoid getting stuck in loops of moving up and down or left and right without changing box positions.
When multiple boxes are present, avoid oscillating between positions without pushing any box closer to a goal.
Do not push boxes into corners or against walls unless the box can be placed on a goal, to prevent deadlocks.
Plan moves to ensure each push advances a box towards a goal, avoiding unnecessary player movements.
Avoid wasting moves when no box is pushed; every move should contribute to solving the puzzle or repositioning boxes effectively.
